title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Thyrocare Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Thyrocare Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Thyrocare Digital Technologies:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare Digital Technologies!
